   306→@click.option('--batch-pages', '-b', type=int, default=0, help='Send messages every N pages (0 = send after all pages)')
   307→@click.option('--interactive', '-i', is_flag=True, help='Enable interactive selector discovery when auto-detection fails')
   308→@click.option('--resume', is_flag=True, help='Resume from last checkpoint')
   309→@click.option('--yes', '-y', is_flag=True, help='Skip confirmation prompt (auto-confirm send)')
   310→@click.option('--preview', is_flag=True, help='Preview first 3 messages without sending (exits after preview)')
   311→@click.option('--auto-filter/--no-auto-filter', default=True, help='Auto filter low-quality candidates')
   312→@click.option('--exchange-phone/--no-exchange-phone', default=False, help='Exchange phone number after sending (default ON in talent_bank mode)')
   313→@click.option('--exchange-wechat/--no-exchange-wechat', default=False, help='Exchange WeChat after sending (default ON in talent_bank mode)')
   314→@click.option('--min-years', type=int, default=None, help='Minimum work years filter (talent_bank/recruit_manage)')
   315→@click.option('--max-years', type=int, default=None, help='Maximum work years threshold (recruit_manage only, e.g. 5 selects up to 5-10年)')
   316→@click.pass_context
   317→def pipeline(ctx, keywords, template, var, company, location, max_pages, mode, dry_run, skip_messaged, batch_pages, interactive, resume, yes, preview, auto_filter, exchange_phone, exchange_wechat, min_years, max_years):
   318→    """
   319→    Search candidates and batch send messages in one command.
   320→
   321→    Combines multi-keyword search with batch messaging:
   322→    search → preview → confirm → send.
   323→
   324→    Use --mode enterprise for the enterprise recruitment path with inline messaging.
   325→    Use --mode talent_bank for the talent bank path with inline messaging.
   326→    Use --mode recruit_manage for the recruit manage path (standard paid accounts).
   327→
   328→    Use --batch-pages to interleave search and messaging every N pages.
   329→    Example: -p 10 --batch-pages 2 searches pages 1-2, sends messages,
   330→    then pages 3-4, sends messages, etc.
   331→
   332→    Use --resume to continue from the last interrupted pipeline run.
   333→
   334→    Examples:\n
   335→        maimai pipeline -k "前端工程师" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" -p 2\n
   336→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -k "后端" -t greeting -v "recruiter_name=张三" --dry-run\n
   337→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 10 --batch-pages 2\n
   338→        maimai pipeline -k "前端" -t greeting -p 1 -i\n
   339→        maimai pipeline -k "研发" -t greeting -m enterprise -p 3\n
   340→        maimai pipeline -k "算法" -t greeting -m talent_bank -p 2\n
   341→        maimai pipeline -k "安卓" -t jd_live -m recruit_manage -p 1\n
   342→        maimai pipeline --resume
   343→    """
   344→    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   345→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   346→    from src.services.pipeline import run_pipeline_default, run_pipeline_batched, SearchMode, search_all_keywords_recruit_manage
   347→
   348→    # Handle resume mode
   349→    if resume:
   350→        ckpt = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   351→        if ckpt is None:
   352→            console.print("[red]No checkpoint found to resume from.[/red]")
   353→            return
   354→
   355→        from rich.panel import Panel
   356→        console.print(Panel(ckpt.summary, title="Resuming Pipeline", border_style="cyan"))
   357→
   358→        p = ckpt.params
   359→        keywords = tuple(p.get('keywords', []))
   360→        template = p.get('template', template)
   361→        variables = p.get('variables', {})
   362→        company = tuple(p.get('company', []))
   363→        location = p.get('location', location)
   364→        max_pages = p.get('max_pages', max_pages)
   365→        batch_pages = p.get('batch_pages', batch_pages)
   366→        skip_messaged = p.get('skip_messaged', skip_messaged)
   367→        interactive = p.get('interactive', interactive)
   368→        mode = p.get('mode', mode)
   369→        dry_run = p.get('dry_run', dry_run)
   370→        exchange_phone = p.get('exchange_phone', exchange_phone)
   371→        exchange_wechat = p.get('exchange_wechat', exchange_wechat)
   372→        min_years = p.get('min_years', min_years)
   373→        max_years = p.get('max_years', max_years)
   374→    else:
   375→        ckpt = None
   376→        variables = _parse_variables(var)
   377→
   378→    if not keywords or not template:
   379→        console.print("[red]--keywords (-k) and --template (-t) are required (or use --resume).[/red]")
   380→        return
   381→
   382→    # Resolve SearchMode enum
   383→    search_mode = SearchMode(mode)
   384→
   385→    # Talent bank and recruit_manage default to exchanging phone & WeChat
   386→    if search_mode in (SearchMode.TALENT_BANK, SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE):
   387→        exchange_phone = True
   388→        exchange_wechat = True
   389→
   390→    if search_mode in (SearchMode.ENTERPRISE, SearchMode.TALENT_BANK, SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE) and batch_pages > 0:
   391→        console.print(f"[yellow]Note: --batch-pages with {search_mode.value} mode uses infinite scroll; "
   392→                      f"each batch opens a fresh search. Deduplication prevents re-messaging.[/yellow]")
   393→
   394→    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   395→
   396→    async def _pipeline():
   397→        from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
   398→        from src.services.pipeline import search_all_keywords, search_all_keywords_enterprise, search_all_keywords_talent_bank
   399→        from src.modules.message import render_template
   400→        from src.utils.config import get_config
   401→        from rich.panel import Panel
   402→
   403→        reset_delay_session()
   404→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   405→        try:
   406→            await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   407→
   408→            # Preview mode: search and show first 3 messages
   409→            if preview:
   410→                console.print("[cyan]Preview 模式: 搜索并预览前 3 条消息[/cyan]\n")
   411→
   412→                if mode == 'enterprise':
   413→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   414→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1)
   415→                    )
   416→                elif mode == 'talent_bank':
   417→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   418→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1),
   419→                        min_years=min_years,
   420→                    )
   421→                elif mode == 'recruit_manage':
   422→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_recruit_manage(
   423→                        browser, keywords, company, min(max_pages, 1),
   424→                        min_years=min_years, max_years=max_years,
   425→                    )
   426→                else:
   427→                    all_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   428→                        browser, keywords, company, location, min(max_pages, 1)
   429→                    )
   430→
   431→                if not all_candidates:
   432→                    console.print("[yellow]没有找到候选人[/yellow]")
   433→                    return
   434→
   435→                # Apply auto-filter
   436→                if auto_filter:
   437→                    from src.utils.filters import filter_candidates
   438→                    before_count = len(all_candidates)
   439→                    candidates_dict = [
   440→                        {
   441→                            'maimai_id': c.maimai_id,
   442→                            'name': c.name,
   443→                            'title': c.title,
   444→                            'company': c.company,
   445→                        }
   446→                        for c in all_candidates
   447→                    ]
   448→                    filtered_dict = filter_candidates(candidates_dict, auto_filter=True)
   449→                    filtered_ids = {c['maimai_id'] for c in filtered_dict}
   450→                    all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.maimai_id in filtered_ids]
   451→
   452→                    if len(all_candidates) < before_count:
   453→                        console.print(f"[dim]自动过滤: {before_count} → {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]\n")
   454→
   455→                    if not all_candidates:
   456→                        console.print("[yellow]过滤后没有符合条件的候选人[/yellow]")
   457→                        return
   458→
   459→                # Load template
   460→                config = get_config()
   461→                tmpl = config.get_template(template)
   462→
   463→                # Show first 3 candidates with rendered messages
   464→                preview_count = min(3, len(all_candidates))
   465→                console.print(f"[bold]预览前 {preview_count} 位候选人的消息:[/bold]\n")
   466→
   467→                for i, c in enumerate(all_candidates[:preview_count], 1):
   468→                    msg_vars = {
   469→                        **variables,
   470→                        'name': c.name,
   471→                        'company': c.company,
   472→                        'position': c.title,
   473→                    }
   474→                    try:
   475→                        rendered = render_template(tmpl['content'], msg_vars)
   476→                        console.print(f"[bold cyan]#{i} {c.name}[/bold cyan] - {c.title} @ {c.company}")
   477→                        console.print(Panel(rendered, title=f"消息预览", border_style="green"))
   478→                        console.print()
   479→                    except Exception as e:
   480→                        console.print(f"[red]渲染失败: {e}[/red]\n")
   481→
   482→                console.print(f"[dim]总共找到 {len(all_candidates)} 位候选人[/dim]")
   483→                console.print("[yellow]Preview 完成，使用 --dry-run 搜索所有页面但不发送[/yellow]")
   484→                return
   485→
   486→            if batch_pages > 0:
   487→                await run_pipeline_batched(
   488→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   489→                    max_pages, batch_pages, template, variables,
   490→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive, ckpt,
   491→                    mode=search_mode,
   492→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   493→                    exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   494→                    exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   495→                    min_years=min_years,
   496→                    max_years=max_years,
   497→                )
   498→            else:
   499→                await run_pipeline_default(
   500→                    browser, keywords, company, location,
   501→                    max_pages, template, variables,
   502→                    dry_run, skip_messaged, interactive,
   503→                    mode=search_mode,
   504→                    skip_confirmation=yes,
   505→                    exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   506→                    exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   507→                    min_years=min_years,
   508→                    max_years=max_years,
   509→                )
   510→        finally:
   511→            await browser.close()
   512→
   513→    run_async(_pipeline())
   514→

   581→@cli.command()
   582→@click.pass_context
   583→def status(ctx):
   584→    """
   585→    快速查看系统状态.
   586→
   587→    显示:
   588→    - Chrome 连接状态
   589→    - 脉脉登录状态
   590→    - 联系券余额
   591→    - 今日操作统计
   592→    - 数据库概况
   593→
   594→    Example:
   595→        maimai status
   596→    """
   597→    from src.core.browser import get_browser_manager
   598→    from src.modules.auth import check_login_status
   599→    from src.modules.message import fetch_contact_quota
   600→    from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter
   601→    from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
   602→    from rich.table import Table
   603→
   604→    _apply_cdp_endpoint(ctx)
   605→
   606→    async def _check_status():
   607→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   608→        db_manager = get_db_manager()
   609→        rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   610→
   611→        console.print("\n[bold cyan]系统状态检查[/bold cyan]\n")
   612→
   613→        status_table = Table(show_header=False, box=None)
   614→        status_table.add_column("Item", style="bold", width=20)
   615→        status_table.add_column("Status")
   616→
   617→        try:
   618→            # Chrome 连接
   619→            await browser.start()
   620→            chrome_status = "✅ 已连接" if browser.is_running else "❌ 未连接"
   621→            status_table.add_row("Chrome 连接", chrome_status)
   622→
   623→            if browser.is_running:
   624→                # 登录状态
   625→                logged_in = await check_login_status(browser.page)
   626→                login_status = "✅ 已登录" if logged_in else "❌ 未登录"
   627→                status_table.add_row("脉脉登录", login_status)
   628→
   629→                # 联系券余额
   630→                if logged_in:
   631→                    try:
   632→                        quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   633→                        if quota:
   634→                            uh_left = quota.get('uh_left', '?')
   635→                            quota_status = f"{uh_left} 张"
   636→                            if isinstance(uh_left, int) and uh_left <= 10:
   637→                                quota_status = f"[yellow]{quota_status} (余量不足)[/yellow]"
   638→                            status_table.add_row("联系券余额", quota_status)
   639→                    except Exception as e:
   640→                        status_table.add_row("联系券余额", f"[dim]查询失败: {e}[/dim]")
   641→
   642→            await browser.close()
   643→
   644→        except Exception as e:
   645→            status_table.add_row("Chrome 连接", f"[red]✗ 连接失败: {e}[/red]")
   646→
   647→        console.print(status_table)
   648→        console.print()
   649→
   650→        # 今日统计
   651→        console.print("[bold cyan]今日操作统计[/bold cyan]\n")
   652→        stats_table = Table(show_header=False, box=None)
   653→        stats_table.add_column("Action", style="bold", width=20)
   654→        stats_table.add_column("Count")
   655→
   656→        for action_type in ['search', 'view_profile', 'send_message']:
   657→            quota_status = rate_limiter.get_quota_status(action_type)
   658→            used = quota_status['hourly']['used']
   659→            hourly_limit = quota_status['hourly']['limit']
   660→            daily_used = quota_status['daily']['used']
   661→            daily_limit = quota_status['daily']['limit']
   662→
   663→            action_names = {
   664→                'search': '搜索',
   665→                'view_profile': '查看简历',
   666→                'send_message': '发送消息'
   667→            }
   668→            stats_table.add_row(
   669→                action_names[action_type],
   670→                f"今日: {daily_used}/{daily_limit}  本小时: {used}/{hourly_limit}"
   671→            )
   672→
   673→        console.print(stats_table)
   674→        console.print()
   675→
   676→        # 数据库统计
   677→        console.print("[bold cyan]数据库概况[/bold cyan]\n")
   678→        db_table = Table(show_header=False, box=None)
   679→        db_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold", width=20)
   680→        db_table.add_column("Value")
   681→
   682→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   683→            total_candidates = session.query(Candidate).count()
   684→            messaged_count = session.query(Message.candidate_maimai_id).filter_by(status='sent').distinct().count()
   685→
   686→            db_table.add_row("候选人总数", str(total_candidates))
   687→            db_table.add_row("已沟通", str(messaged_count))
   688→            if total_candidates > 0:
   689→                coverage = messaged_count / total_candidates * 100
   690→                db_table.add_row("覆盖率", f"{coverage:.1f}%")
   691→
   692→        console.print(db_table)
   693→        console.print()
   694→
   695→    run_async(_check_status())

   698→@cli.command()
   699→@click.option('--limit', '-n', default=10, type=int, help='显示数量 (默认 10)')
   700→def recent(limit):

   703→
   704→    Example:

   706→        maimai recent -n 20

   713→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:

   715→            .order_by(Candidate.first_seen.desc())\

   717→
   718→        if not candidates:

   728→        table.add_column("公司", style="yellow", width=20)
   729→        table.add_column("添加时间", style="blue", width=16)
   730→
   731→        for i, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):

   744→@cli.command()
   745→def duplicates():
   746→    """
   747→    查找重复的候选人.
   748→
   749→    按姓名+公司分组，显示重复项。
   750→
   751→    Example:
   752→        maimai duplicates
   753→    """
   754→    from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
   755→    from sqlalchemy import func
   756→    from rich.table import Table
   757→
   758→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   759→
   760→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   761→        # 按 name + company 分组，找出重复项
   762→        duplicates_query = session.query(
   763→            Candidate.name,
   764→            Candidate.company,
   765→            func.count(Candidate.id).label('count')
   766→        ).group_by(Candidate.name, Candidate.company)\
   767→         .having(func.count(Candidate.id) > 1)\
   768→         .all()
   769→
   770→        if not duplicates_query:
   771→            console.print("[green]✓ 没有发现重复的候选人[/green]")
   772→            return
   773→
   774→        console.print(f"\n[yellow]发现 {len(duplicates_query)} 组重复候选人:[/yellow]\n")
   775→
   776→        table = Table()
   777→        table.add_column("姓名", style="cyan")
   778→        table.add_column("公司", style="yellow")
   779→        table.add_column("重复次数", style="red", justify="right")
   780→
   781→        for name, company, count in duplicates_query:
   782→            table.add_row(name, company or '[dim]未知[/dim]', f"×{count}")
   783→
   784→        console.print(table)
   785→        console.print()
   786→        console.print("[dim]提示: 使用数据库工具手动清理重复项[/dim]")
   787→
   788→
   789→def _parse_variables(var: tuple) -> dict:
   790→    """Parse key=value variable pairs from CLI option."""
   791→    variables = {}
   792→    for v in var:
   793→        if '=' in v:
   794→            key, value = v.split('=', 1)
   795→            variables[key.strip()] = value.strip()
   796→        else:
   797→            console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: ignoring malformed variable '{v}' (expected key=value format)[/yellow]")
   798→    return variables
   799→
   800→
   801→def main():
   802→    """Main entry point."""
   803→    try:
   804→        cli()
   805→    except MaimaiAssistantError as e:
   806→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   807→        sys.exit(1)
   808→    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   809→        console.print("\n[yellow]Operation cancelled by user[/yellow]")
   810→        sys.exit(0)
   811→    except Exception as e:
   812→        console.print(f"[red]Unexpected error: {e}[/red]")
   813→        sys.exit(1)
   814→
   815→
   816→if __name__ == '__main__':
   817→    main()

    67→# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page
    68→MAIMAI_CHAT_URL = (
    69→    "https://maimai.cn/bizmember/uh_chat_pc?u2={user_id}&from=pc_web_search&fr=profile"
    70→)
    71→
    72→
    73→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    74→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    75→
    76→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    77→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    78→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    79→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    80→    """
    81→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    82→
    83→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    84→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    85→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    86→    for key in ("dstu", "u2", "egid"):
    87→        if key in params:
    88→            return params[key][0]
    89→    return None
    90→
    91→
    92→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    93→    page: Page,
    94→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    95→    config,
    96→    browser: BrowserManager,
    97→    maimai_id: str,
    98→    interactive: bool = False,
    99→    discovered_selectors=None,
   100→) -> bool:
   101→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
   102→
   103→    Tries in order:
   104→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
   105→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
   106→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
   107→
   108→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
   109→
   110→    Args:
   111→        page: Playwright page instance
   112→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
   113→        config: Config instance
   114→        browser: Browser manager instance
   115→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   116→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
   117→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
   118→
   119→    Returns:
   120→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
   121→    """
   122→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   123→
   124→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
   125→    if not profile_url:
   126→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   127→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
   128→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
   129→
   130→        if not profile_url:
   131→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
   132→
   133→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   134→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   135→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   136→
   137→    if user_id:
   138→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   139→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   140→        await async_random_delay("page_load")
   141→        return True
   142→
   143→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   144→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   145→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   146→    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   147→
   148→    current_url = page.url
   149→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   150→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   151→    if redirected_user_id:
   152→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   153→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   154→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   155→        await async_random_delay("page_load")
   156→        return True
   157→
   158→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   159→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   160→    if chat_button_found:
   161→        await async_random_delay("action")
   162→        return True
   163→
   164→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   165→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   166→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   167→
   168→        console.print(
   169→            "[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]"
   170→        )
   171→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   172→        if result.is_populated:
   173→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   174→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   175→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   176→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   177→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   178→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   179→            return True
   180→
   181→    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   182→    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   183→    return False
   184→

    82→async def search_all_keywords(
    83→    browser: BrowserManager,
    84→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    85→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    86→    location: Optional[str],
    87→    max_pages: int,
    88→    start_page: int = 1,
    89→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    90→    """Iterate keywords, deduplicate, return combined results.
    91→
    92→    Args:
    93→        browser: BrowserManager instance
    94→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
    95→        company: Company filter strings
    96→        location: Location filter or None
    97→        max_pages: Pages per keyword
    98→        start_page: First page number
    99→
   100→    Returns:
   101→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
   102→    """
   103→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   104→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   105→
   106→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   107→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Searching: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   108→
   109→        candidates = await search_candidates(
   110→            keywords=kw,
   111→            company=company,
   112→            location=location,
   113→            pages=max_pages,
   114→            start_page=start_page,
   115→            browser=browser,
   116→        )
   117→
   118→        new_count = 0
   119→        for c in candidates:
   120→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   121→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   122→                all_candidates.append(c)
   123→                new_count += 1
   124→
   125→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   126→
   127→    return all_candidates, seen_ids

    44→    "商务", "品牌", "公关", "客服", "采购", "招商",

    53→def _is_non_rd_title(title: str) -> bool:
    54→    """Check if a title indicates a non-R&D role.
    55→
    56→    Strict mode: if any non-R&D keyword appears, filter out regardless of
    57→    whether R&D keywords are also present (e.g. "技术产品经理" is filtered).
    58→    Returns False (keep) only if title is empty or contains no non-R&D keywords.
    59→    """
    60→    if not title:
    61→        return False
    62→
    63→    # Strict: any non-R&D keyword present → filter out (case-insensitive)
    64→    title_lower = title.lower()
    65→    if any(kw.lower() in title_lower for kw in NON_RD_KEYWORDS):
    66→        return True
    67→
    68→    return False

    72→class CandidateBasic:
    73→    """Basic candidate information from search results."""

    76→    title: str

    83→async def search_candidates(
    84→    keywords: str,
    85→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    86→    location: Optional[str] = None,
    87→    pages: int = 1,
    88→    start_page: int = 1,
    89→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    90→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    91→    """
    92→    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    93→
    94→    Args:
    95→        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "高级前端工程师")
    96→        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    97→        location: Filter by location (optional)
    98→        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    99→        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
   100→        browser: Browser manager instance
   101→
   102→    Returns:
   103→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   104→
   105→    Raises:
   106→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   107→        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   108→    """
   109→    # Validate inputs
   110→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   111→
   112→    if browser is None:
   113→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   114→
   115→    config = get_config()
   116→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   117→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   118→
   119→    # Ensure logged in
   120→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   121→
   122→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   123→    seen_ids: set = set()  # Deduplicate across infinite-scroll extractions
   124→
   125→    with Progress(
   126→        SpinnerColumn(),
   127→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   128→        console=console
   129→    ) as progress:
   130→
   131→        end_page = start_page + pages
   132→        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   133→            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   134→
   135→            try:
   136→                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   137→                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   138→
   139→                page = browser.page
   140→
   141→                if page_num == start_page:
   142→                    # First page: interactive search (maimai SPA ignores URL query params)
   143→                    await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   144→                    await asyncio.sleep(1)
   145→
   146→                    # Find search input and type keyword
   147→                    search_input = (
   148→                        await page.query_selector('input[placeholder="搜索"]')
   149→                        or await page.query_selector('input[type="search"]')
   150→                        or await page.query_selector('.search-input input, .header input[type="text"]')
   151→                    )
   152→                    if not search_input:
   153→                        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Search input not found on search center page")
   154→
   155→                    await search_input.click()
   156→                    await search_input.fill(keywords)
   157→                    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
   158→                    await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
   159→                    await asyncio.sleep(2)
   160→
   161→                    # Default tab is 实名动态(feed); switch to 人脉(contacts)
   162→                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector(':text-is("人脉")')
   163→                    if renmai_tab:
   164→                        await renmai_tab.click()
   165→                        await asyncio.sleep(2)
   166→                    else:
   167→                        logger.warning("Could not find '人脉' tab on search results page")
   168→                else:
   169→                    # Subsequent pages: scroll to load more (infinite scroll)
   170→                    prev_count = await page.evaluate(
   171→                        'document.querySelectorAll(\'[id^="contactcard_"]\').length'
   172→                    )
   173→                    await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=1500)
   174→                    # Wait for new cards to load
   175→                    try:
   176→                        await page.wait_for_function(
   177→                            f'''() => {{
   178→                                const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   179→                                return cards.length > {prev_count};
   180→                            }}''',
   181→                            timeout=8000,
   182→                        )
   183→                    except TimeoutError:
   184→                        logger.debug(f"No new cards after scroll (had {prev_count})")
   185→                    except Exception as e:
   186→                        logger.warning(f"Error waiting for new cards after scroll: {e}")
   187→
   188→                # Wait for contactcard elements
   189→                try:
   190→                    await page.wait_for_function(
   191→                        '''() => {
   192→                            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   193→                            return cards.length >= 1;
   194→                        }''',
   195→                        timeout=8000,
   196→                    )
   197→                except TimeoutError:
   198→                    logger.debug("Timed out waiting for contactcard elements, proceeding anyway")
   199→                except Exception as e:
   200→                    logger.warning(f"Error waiting for contactcard elements: {e}")

   113→@click.option('--max-pages', '-p', type=int, default=1, help='Maximum pages to scrape per keyword')
   114→@click.option('--mode', '-m', type=click.Choice(['search_center', 'enterprise', 'talent_bank', 'recruit_manage']), default='search_center',
   115→              help='Search mode: search_center (default), enterprise, or talent_bank')

   118→@click.pass_context
   119→def search(ctx, keywords, company, location, max_pages, mode, export, auto_filter):
   120→    """
   121→    Search for candidates with specified criteria.
   122→
   123→    Supports multiple keywords - each will be searched separately and results merged.
   124→
   125→    Use --mode enterprise for the enterprise recruitment tab.
   126→    Use --mode talent_bank for the talent bank path.
   127→    Use --mode recruit_manage for the recruit manage path (standard paid accounts).
   128→
   129→    Examples:\n
   130→        maimai search -k "高级前端工程师" -c "阿里巴巴" --max-pages 3\n
   131→        maimai search -k "前端工程师" -k "React开发" -k "Vue工程师" -p 2\n
   132→        maimai search -k "研发" -m enterprise\n
   133→        maimai search -k "算法" -m talent_bank\n

1→"""Configuration loader and manager."""
     2→
     3→import json
     4→from pathlib import Path
     5→from typing import Any, Dict
     6→
     7→from loguru import logger
     8→
     9→from src.exceptions.errors import ConfigurationError
    10→
    11→_MISSING = object()  # sentinel for missing keys
    12→
    13→
    14→class Config:
    15→    """Configuration manager for Maimai Assistant."""
    16→
    17→    def __init__(self, config_dir: str = None):
    18→        if config_dir is None:
    19→            # Resolve relative to project root (3 levels up from this file)
    20→            config_dir = str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "config")
    21→        self.config_dir = Path(config_dir)
    22→        self._settings: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    23→        self._selectors: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    24→        self._message_templates: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    25→
    26→        self._load_all()
    27→
    28→    def _load_json(self, filename: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    29→        """Load JSON configuration file."""
    30→        filepath = self.config_dir / filename
    31→        try:
    32→            with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    33→                return json.load(f)
    34→        except FileNotFoundError:
    35→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Configuration file not found: {filepath}")
    36→        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    37→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid JSON in {filepath}: {e}")
    38→
    39→    def _load_all(self):
    40→        """Load all configuration files."""
    41→        logger.info("Loading configuration files...")
    42→        self._settings = self._load_json("settings.json")
    43→        self._selectors = self._load_json("selectors.json")
    44→        self._message_templates = self._load_json("message_templates.json")
    45→        logger.info("Configuration loaded successfully")
    46→
    47→    def get(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
    48→        """Get setting by dot-notation key (e.g., 'browser.headless').
    49→
    50→        Returns the configured value, including explicit ``null`` (None).
    51→        Only falls back to *default* when the key path does not exist.
    52→        """
    53→        keys = key.split('.')
    54→        value = self._settings
    55→
    56→        for k in keys:
    57→            if isinstance(value, dict):
    58→                value = value.get(k, _MISSING)
    59→                if value is _MISSING:
    60→                    return default
    61→            else:
    62→                return default
    63→
    64→        return value
    65→
    66→    def get_selector(self, selector_path: str) -> str:
    67→        """Get selector by dot-notation path (e.g., 'search.keyword_input')."""
    68→        keys = selector_path.split('.')
    69→        value = self._selectors.get('selectors', {})
    70→
    71→        for k in keys:
    72→            if isinstance(value, dict):
    73→                value = value.get(k)
    74→                if value is None:
    75→                    raise ConfigurationError(f"Selector not found: {selector_path}")
    76→            else:
    77→                raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid selector path: {selector_path}")
    78→
    79→        return value
    80→
    81→    def get_template(self, template_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    82→        """Get message template by name."""
    83→        template = self._message_templates.get(template_name)
    84→        if template is None:
    85→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Message template not found: {template_name}")
    86→        return template
    87→
    88→    def list_templates(self) -> list:
    89→        """List all available message template names."""
    90→        return list(self._message_templates.keys())
    91→
    92→
    93→def _deep_merge(base: Dict[str, Any], override: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    94→    """Deep merge override into a copy of base. Override wins on conflicts."""
    95→    import copy
    96→    result = copy.deepcopy(base)
    97→    for key, value in override.items():
    98→        if key in result and isinstance(result[key], dict) and isinstance(value, dict):
    99→            result[key] = _deep_merge(result[key], value)
   100→        else:
   101→            result[key] = copy.deepcopy(value)
   102→    return result
   103→
   104→
   105→def apply_profile(
   106→    profile_name: str,
   107→    config: Config = None,
   108→    project_root: Path = None,
   109→) -> None:
   110→    """Override config data paths and optionally merge profile-local settings.
   111→
   112→    Args:
   113→        profile_name: Profile directory name (e.g. 'alice', 'bob')
   114→        config: Config instance to modify (defaults to global)
   115→        project_root: Project root for resolving paths (defaults to auto-detect)
   116→    """
   117→    if config is None:
   118→        config = get_config()
   119→    if project_root is None:
   120→        project_root = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent
   121→
   122→    profile_dir = project_root / "data" / "profiles" / profile_name
   123→    profile_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   124→
   125→    # Merge profile-local settings.json if it exists
   126→    profile_settings_path = profile_dir / "settings.json"
   127→    if profile_settings_path.exists():
   128→        import json
   129→        with open(profile_settings_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   130→            profile_settings = json.load(f)
   131→        config._settings = _deep_merge(config._settings, profile_settings)
   132→
   133→    # Override all data.* paths to point under profile dir
   134→    rel_profile = f"data/profiles/{profile_name}"
   135→    data_overrides = {
   136→        "database_path": f"{rel_profile}/maimai.db",
   137→        "session_path": f"{rel_profile}/.session/maimai_session.json",
   138→        "log_dir": f"{rel_profile}/logs",
   139→        "screenshot_dir": f"{rel_profile}/screenshots",
   140→        "export_dir": f"{rel_profile}/exports",
   141→        "checkpoint_dir": f"{rel_profile}/.checkpoints",
   142→    }
   143→    if "data" not in config._settings:
   144→        config._settings["data"] = {}
   145→    config._settings["data"].update(data_overrides)
   146→
   147→    logger.info(f"Profile '{profile_name}' applied — data dir: {profile_dir}")
   148→
   149→
   150→# Global configuration instance
   151→_config_instance = None
   152→
   153→
   154→def get_config() -> Config:
   155→    """Get global configuration instance."""
   156→    global _config_instance
   157→    if _config_instance is None:
   158→        _config_instance = Config()
   159→    return _config_instance
   160→
   161→
   162→

1→"""Input validation utilities."""
     2→
     3→import re
     4→from typing import Dict, Any
     5→
     6→from src.exceptions.errors import ValidationError
     7→
     8→
     9→def validate_maimai_id(maimai_id: str) -> str:
    10→    """
    11→    Validate Maimai user ID format.
    12→
    13→    Args:
    14→        maimai_id: Maimai user ID to validate
    15→
    16→    Returns:
    17→        Validated and cleaned ID
    18→
    19→    Raises:
    20→        ValidationError: If ID format is invalid
    21→    """
    22→    if not maimai_id:
    23→        raise ValidationError("Maimai ID cannot be empty")
    24→
    25→    # Remove whitespace
    26→    maimai_id = str(maimai_id).strip()
    27→
    28→    # Check if it's alphanumeric
    29→    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$', maimai_id):
    30→        raise ValidationError(f"Invalid Maimai ID format: {maimai_id}")
    31→
    32→    return maimai_id
    33→
    34→
    35→def validate_keywords(keywords: str) -> str:
    36→    """
    37→    Validate search keywords.
    38→
    39→    Args:
    40→        keywords: Search keywords
    41→
    42→    Returns:
    43→        Validated keywords
    44→
    45→    Raises:
    46→        ValidationError: If keywords are invalid
    47→    """
    48→    if not keywords or not keywords.strip():
    49→        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot be empty")
    50→
    51→    keywords = keywords.strip()
    52→
    53→    # Check length
    54→    if len(keywords) < 2:
    55→        raise ValidationError("Search keywords must be at least 2 characters")
    56→
    57→    if len(keywords) > 200:
    58→        raise ValidationError("Search keywords cannot exceed 200 characters")
    59→
    60→    return keywords
    61→
    62→
    63→def validate_template_variables(template: Dict[str, Any], variables: Dict[str, str]) -> None:
    64→    """
    65→    Validate that all required template variables are provided.
    66→
    67→    Args:
    68→        template: Template dictionary with 'variables' key
    69→        variables: Provided variables dictionary
    70→
    71→    Raises:
    72→        ValidationError: If required variables are missing
    73→    """
    74→    required_vars = template.get('variables', [])
    75→    provided_vars = set(variables.keys())
    76→    required_set = set(required_vars)
    77→
    78→    missing_vars = required_set - provided_vars
    79→
    80→    if missing_vars:
    81→        raise ValidationError(
    82→            f"Missing required template variables: {', '.join(missing_vars)}"
    83→        )
    84→
    85→
    86→def validate_template_rendering(template_content: str, variables: Dict[str, str], candidate: Dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[bool, list[str]]:
    87→    """
    88→    Validate that all placeholders in template can be filled.
    89→
    90→    Args:
    91→        template_content: Template string with {variable} placeholders
    92→        variables: Common variables dict
    93→        candidate: Candidate info dict
    94→
    95→    Returns:
    96→        Tuple of (is_valid, missing_variables)
    97→    """
    98→    # Extract all {variable} placeholders from template
    99→    import re
   100→    placeholders = set(re.findall(r'\{(\w+)\}', template_content))
   101→
   102→    # Merge all available variables
   103→    all_vars = {**variables, **candidate}
   104→    provided = set(all_vars.keys())
   105→
   106→    # Find missing variables
   107→    missing = placeholders - provided
   108→
   109→    # Also check if any variable value is None or empty
   110→    empty_vars = [k for k in placeholders if k in all_vars and not all_vars[k]]
   111→
   112→    if missing or empty_vars:
   113→        return False, list(missing) + empty_vars
   114→
   115→    return True, []
   116→
   117→

1→"""Smart filtering utilities for candidates.
     2→
     3→自动过滤低质量候选人，提升搜索效率。
     4→"""
     5→
     6→from typing import List
     7→from loguru import logger
     8→
     9→
    10→def is_recruiter(title: str) -> bool:
    11→    """
    12→    判断是否是 HR/猎头.
    13→
    14→    Args:
    15→        title: 职位名称
    16→
    17→    Returns:
    18→        True if is recruiter
    19→    """
    20→    if not title:
    21→        return False
    22→
    23→    title_lower = title.lower()
    24→    hr_keywords = [
    25→        '招聘', 'hr', 'hrbp', '人力', '猎头', 'recruiter',
    26→        'headhunter', '人事', 'talent acquisition',
    27→        'hr manager', 'hr director', '人力资源',
    28→    ]
    29→
    30→    return any(kw in title_lower for kw in hr_keywords)
    31→
    32→
    33→
    34→def filter_candidates(
    35→    candidates: List[dict],
    36→    auto_filter: bool = True,
    37→    include_recruiters: bool = False
    38→) -> List[dict]:
    39→    """
    40→    智能过滤候选人列表.
    41→
    42→    Args:
    43→        candidates: List of candidate dicts
    44→        auto_filter: Enable auto filtering (default True)
    45→        include_recruiters: If True, don't filter out recruiters
    46→
    47→    Returns:
    48→        Filtered candidate list
    49→    """
    50→    if not auto_filter:
    51→        return candidates
    52→
    53→    filtered = []
    54→    stats = {
    55→        'hash_id': 0,
    56→        'incomplete': 0,
    57→        'recruiter': 0,
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    for c in candidates:
    61→        # Check ID
    62→        if not c.get('maimai_id', '').startswith('mm_'):
    63→            stats['hash_id'] += 1
    64→            continue
    65→
    66→        # Check completeness
    67→        if not c.get('name') or not c.get('title') or not c.get('company'):
    68→            stats['incomplete'] += 1
    69→            continue
    70→
    71→        # Check recruiter
    72→        if not include_recruiters and is_recruiter(c.get('title', '')):
    73→            stats['recruiter'] += 1
    74→            continue
    75→
    76→        filtered.append(c)
    77→
    78→    if len(filtered) < len(candidates):
    79→        logger.info(
    80→            f"Auto-filter: {len(candidates)} → {len(filtered)} candidates "
    81→            f"(removed: {stats['hash_id']} hash ID, {stats['incomplete']} incomplete, "
    82→            f"{stats['recruiter']} recruiters)"
    83→        )
    84→
    85→    return filtered
    86→

    26→class Candidate(Base):

    91→class ActionLog(Base):

    98→    timestamp = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow, nullable=False)

   100→

   104→    )

   109→
   110→def _set_wal_mode(dbapi_conn, connection_record):
   111→    """Enable WAL mode on every new SQLite connection.
   112→
   113→    WAL mode allows concurrent readers with a single writer,
   114→    suitable for 2-5 concurrent web users.
   115→    """
   116→    cursor = dbapi_conn.cursor()
   117→    cursor.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
   118→    cursor.close()
   119→
   120→
   121→class DatabaseManager:
   122→    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   123→
   124→    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   125→        """Initialize database manager."""
   126→        if db_path is None:
   127→            config = get_config()
   128→            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/maimai.db')
   129→
   130→        # Ensure data directory exists
   131→        db_file = Path(db_path)
   132→        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   133→
   134→        # Use QueuePool with WAL mode for concurrent read support (web service).
   135→        # check_same_thread=False is still needed for SQLite in multi-threaded context.
   136→        self.db_path = db_path
   137→        self.engine = create_engine(
   138→            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   139→            echo=False,
   140→            poolclass=QueuePool,
   141→            pool_size=5,
   142→            max_overflow=10,
   143→            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   144→        )
   145→
   146→        # Enable WAL mode on every connection
   147→        event.listen(self.engine, "connect", _set_wal_mode)
   148→
   149→        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   150→

1→"""Pipeline checkpoint manager for resume capability.
     2→
     3→Saves pipeline progress to a JSON file so that interrupted pipelines
     4→can be resumed from where they left off.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import json
     8→import os
     9→import tempfile
    10→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
    13→
    14→from loguru import logger
    15→
    16→
    17→def _get_checkpoint_dir() -> Path:
    18→    """Resolve checkpoint directory from config or use default."""
    19→    project_root = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent
    20→    try:
    21→        from src.utils.config import get_config
    22→
    23→        config = get_config()
    24→        configured = config.get("data.checkpoint_dir", "data/.checkpoints")
    25→        path = Path(configured)
    26→        return path if path.is_absolute() else project_root / path
    27→    except Exception:
    28→        return project_root / "data" / ".checkpoints"
    29→
    30→
    31→class CheckpointManager:
    32→    """Manages pipeline checkpoint save/load for resume support."""
    33→
    34→    def __init__(self, checkpoint_id: Optional[str] = None):
    35→        checkpoint_dir = _get_checkpoint_dir()
    36→        checkpoint_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    37→
    38→        if checkpoint_id:
    39→            self.checkpoint_path = checkpoint_dir / f"{checkpoint_id}.json"
    40→        else:
    41→            # Generate ID from timestamp
    42→            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    43→            self.checkpoint_path = checkpoint_dir / f"pipeline_{ts}.json"
    44→
    45→        self._data: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    46→
    47→    def save(
    48→        self,
    49→        keywords: tuple,
    50→        template: str,
    51→        variables: dict,
    52→        company: tuple,
    53→        location: Optional[str],
    54→        max_pages: int,
    55→        batch_pages: int,
    56→        skip_messaged: bool,
    57→        interactive: bool,
